title: Admission Control Primitive v1
description: Bounded admission-control schema for governed permission of state transitions. Promoted from candidate 004 (admission-gate-doctrine) as an admission-control primitive, NOT a full 15-gate doctrine blob. Invariant: admission is not truth; admission is governed permission for state transition under authority, executor, scope, evidence, and receipt.

schema_version.description: SemVer version of this schema. v1.0.0 is the bounded promotion from candidate 004.

authority.description: Authority gate: who authorized this state transition and under what scope.

executor.description: Actor gate: who is requesting and who will execute.

scope.description: Scope gate: what will be touched and how reversible it is.

evidence.description: Evidence gate: what evidence supports this state transition.

receipt.description: Receipt gate: hash-chained proof of admission.

cost_latency.description: Cost/Latency gate (novel, candidate 004 §3.1): admission-time cost and escalation budget. preferred_model_lane is enum-tied to MODEL_TIERS.md (resolved 2026-06-23).

allowed_model_tiers.description: References model-tier-policy.md surfaces. Separate from allowed_surfaces (resolved 2026-06-23: both taxonomies as separate fields).

doctrine.description: True if the proposal touches doctrine/guardrail files. Routes through cross-check-protocol.md review regardless of classification.

data_sensitivity.description: Data Sensitivity gate (novel, candidate 004 §3.2): admission-time data classification. doctrine: true routes through cross-check review.

source_of_record.description: Proposer-emitted. References to canonical sources (git refs, receipt hashes, rule file paths, task registry entries).

freshness_required.description: Proposer-emitted. If true, the gateway must populate freshness_checked_at and stale_sources before execution.

freshness_checked_at.description: GATEWAY-EMITTED ONLY. Set by the action-gateway's deterministic enrichment stage, not by the proposer. Proposer-supplied values must be rejected by the gateway.

stale_sources.description: GATEWAY-EMITTED ONLY. Sources found stale at admission time; must be refreshed before execution. Populated by the gateway, not the proposer.

context_freshness.description: Context Freshness gate (novel, candidate 004 §3.3): admission-time freshness check. Gateway-emitted fields enforced by action-gateway implementation (resolved 2026-06-23: document in docs/action-gateway.md).
